failure_matrix.impact: Pipeline execution fails at Stage 2 (Blueprint Generation)
failure_matrix.mitigation: Graceful error propagation with HTTP 500, no corrupted database writes

failure_matrix.impact: High request latency on first hit (cold start)
failure_matrix.mitigation: Configured request timeout limits (30s) exceeding latency thresholds

failure_matrix.impact: Trace record not stored in local context DB
failure_matrix.mitigation: Append-only Bucket storage acts as the fallback source of truth
failure_matrix.recovery_action: Reconstruction of state from Bucket files
